file.content:
{
  "name": "personalwebsite",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "packageManager": "npm@10.9.2",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "postbuild": "next-sitemap --config next-sitemap.config.js && npm run build:resume-pdf",
    "build:resume-pdf": "tsx scripts/resume/build-pdf.ts",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "ship-gate:projects": "tsx scripts/ship-gates/projects.ts",
    "ingest": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts",
    "ingest:rebuild": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts --rebuild",
    "evals:llm": "tsx evals/llm/run.ts",
    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:migrate": "tsx scripts/llm/migrate.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/sdk": "^0.91.1",
    "@mdx-js/loader": "^3.1.1",
    "@mdx-js/react": "^3.1.1",
    "@next/mdx": "^16.2.4",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-visually-hidden": "^1.2.4",
    "@types/mdx": "^2.0.13",
    "@upstash/redis": "^1.37.0",
    "@vercel/analytics": "^2.0.1",
    "drizzle-orm": "^0.45.2",
    "framer-motion": "^12.38.0",
    "fuse.js": "^7.3.0",
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
    "pgvector": "^0.2.1",
    "postgres": "^3.4.9",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.12"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/tokenizer": "^0.0.4",
    "@axe-core/react": "^4.11.2",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.59.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "axe-core": "^4.11.3",
    "drizzle-kit": "^0.31.10",
    "eslint": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^15.1.0",
    "jsdom": "^29.0.2",
    "prettier": "^3.8.3",
    "stylelint": "^17.8.0",
    "stylelint-config-standard": "^40.0.0",
    "tsx": "^4.21.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^4.1.4"
  }
}

lines: // Capture the latest message list synchronously so the request payload
// includes the just-pushed user message — useState updates don't flush
-    // Drop any trailing errored assistant placeholder so we don't leave
-    // stale state in the visible history. The user message stays.
-    // Build the server payload from completed messages plus the retried text.
-      // Defensive: if the user message is missing from history, append it.
-    // The streaming loop catches the abort and finalizes the placeholder.
-    // We pre-emptively flip status here so callers see the change without
-  // Keep a synchronous mirror of `messages` so submit/retry can read the
-  // latest list without waiting for state to settle.
